title: The digital euro: Surveillance money, or a better alternative to cash?
summary: The digital euro: Surveillance money, or a better alternative to cash?
briefing: Proponents of the digital euro say its a better alternative to cash that’s fully backed by the ECB. But critics argue it could provide the EU with too much power over its citizens.

title: Franklin Templeton calls agentic AI next ‘killer’ use case for blockchain
summary: Franklin Templeton calls agentic AI next ‘killer’ use case for blockchain
briefing: Franklin Templeton’s digital assets lead said that the autonomous AI agent economy will increase demand for blockchain protocols hosting machine-to-machine micropayments.

title: Here’s what happened in crypto today

title: Zilliqa Ledger app vulnerability lets attackers recover signer’s private keys
summary: Zilliqa Ledger app vulnerability lets attackers recover signer’s private keys
briefing: A security vulnerability in the Zilliqa Ledger app is enabling attackers to reconstruct private keys using publicly available onchain data.

summary: Crypto institutions look beyond audits as trust signals falter: Hacken

summary: Justin Sun's HTX 'Rotating' On-Chain Wallets Amid UK Sanctions: TRM Labs

title: Augustus Raises $180 Million to Build a Stablecoin-Ready 'Global Dollar Bank'
summary: Augustus Raises $180 Million to Build a Stablecoin-Ready 'Global Dollar Bank'
briefing: The Tiger Global-led round values the startup at $1 billion as it wires stablecoin rails directly into a federally chartered bank, aiming to modernize the correspondent-banking plumbing behind cross-border payments.
